scope: goat-desktop / read-only repo and local health scan
goal: Check the current GOAT Desktop state against governance docs, tests, local health, and the staged action safety model without changing runtime behavior.
claims: Current branch, commit, remote, and working tree checked
Stage 1/2/3/4 safety boundaries checked against code and tests
assumptions: No LiveTalk or microphone work during scan
No real user fields during scan
No Stage 3 OS execution exists or is tested
Local bridge health may be checked on 127.0.0.1:8765
dod: Commands and checked commit are listed
stop_conditions: A command would read or print secrets
A command would start microphone capture
A command would execute real mouse or keyboard actions outside a controlled test window
A command would trigger Stage 3 OS execution
